bullet_points: Apply the kymatio patch (sph_harm to sph_harm_y) if import fails.
Reconstruct 2D maps from flattened arrays using the survey mask, using mmap_mode='r' to stay within memory limits.
Implement a batch-processing pipeline (batch size 64) to add Gaussian noise to training maps, ensuring noise is zeroed out outside the survey mask.
Compute Wavelet Scattering Transform (WST) features (J=3, L=8) on GPU.
Apply global average pooling to obtain a 217-dimensional feature vector per map.
Save the resulting feature matrices for training and test sets to disk.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Data Preprocessing and WST Feature Extraction

bullet_points: Load WST features and labels.
Compute Z-score normalization parameters (mean and std) from the training set and save them as separate arrays.
Apply normalization to both training and test feature sets.
Split the training data into training and validation sets (80/20 split by cosmology).
Save the normalized features and split indices to disk.
Construct a Masked Autoregressive Flow (MAF) using zuko.flows.MAF.
Train the flow to learn the conditional density of WST features given the 5 parameters.
If training fails to converge or shows high sensitivity to nuisance parameters, fall back to conditioning only on the two cosmological parameters (Omega_m, S_8).
Use GPU acceleration, Adam optimizer, and early stopping based on validation set NLL.
Save the trained model weights.
Train a 3-layer MLP to predict the 5 parameters from the WST features.
Use MSE loss and Adam optimizer on GPU.
Print the per-parameter prediction error (normalized RMSE) on the validation set for each of the 5 parameters.
Save the trained regressor model.
Load the trained CNF and MLP regressor.
Predict the parameter vector theta_hat for each test map using the MLP.
Evaluate the NLL of test features under the CNF conditioned on theta_hat.
Generate and save a histogram/KDE plot of the NLL scores for the test set.
Save the NLL scores as the final OoD scores in the required submission format.
Construct a synthetic OoD validation set using held-out cosmologies and a signal rescaling perturbation.
Compute the partial AUC score (FPR in [0.001, 0.05]) using the score_phase2 utility.
Generate and save a plot of the partial ROC curve (TPR vs. FPR on log scale).
Print the validation score and save all results for the researcher.
Synthesize performance metrics (partial AUC) and interpret the effectiveness of the VCSF approach.
Discuss the role of WST features in capturing non-Gaussian baryonic signatures.
Analyze the robustness of the method to nuisance parameters, referencing the regressor RMSE results.
Reference all generated plots (NLL distribution, partial ROC curve) and quote all key numerical results (validation partial AUC, architecture details, regressor performance).
Write the final Results section for the scientific report.
